variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 52301 Suction Filter | Replaces the Argo-Hytos P2092301
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 52301 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2

variants.title: Donaldson P173489 Lube Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Argo-Hytos P2092301
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P173489 Lube Filter, Cartridge ensures clean engine oil by effectively trapping harmful contaminants, promoting extended oil life and maintaining optimal engine efficiency. Its high-performance filtration media helps protect critical components from premature wear and supports consistent engine operation. Built for durability and long service intervals, this cartridge lube filter is ideal for demanding conditions. It offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and ensures reliable lubrication, contributing to improved engine longevity and reduced maintenance.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2

variants.title: Filtrec S531C10 Suction Filter | Replaces the Argo-Hytos P2092301
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec S531C10. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the S531C10 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2

variants.title: Argo Hytos P3.1130-01 | Replaces the Argo-Hytos P2092301
variants.description: Original Argo-Hytos P3.1130-01 filter. Benefits - Reliable oil cleanliness and permanent protection of sensitive components over the entire operating life. - Good cold start performance, i.e. closed bypass valve even at low temperatures. Lower energy consumption results in lower operating costs and conserves resources. - Longer maintenance intervals and thus improved productivity and economic efficiency. - Excellent differential pressure stability, ensuring filtration stability by avoiding damage to the filter bellows. - High flow fatigue strength which guarantee of oil cleanliness even with strongly alternating flow loads.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2

variants.title: Fleetguard HF28794 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Argo-Hytos P2092301
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF28794 hydraulic cartridge filter is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
